zh.lifeSummary: 當William Saunders於1410年出生在英國素瑞哈列武德時，他的父親Thomas Saundre26歲，母親Joan Odworth22歲。他和Joan Carew至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1481年8月在他的家鄉享年71歲，埋葬在英國素瑞哈列武德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Saunders于1410年出生在英国素瑞哈列武德时，他的父亲Thomas Saundre26岁，母亲Joan Odworth22岁。他和Joan Carew至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1481年8月在他的家乡享年71岁，埋葬在英国素瑞哈列武德。

nameMeanings.name: Saunders
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Surrey and Kent): variant of Sander , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Sander
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt, Erna, Erwin, Fritz, Manfred, Bernhard, Dieter, Franz, Gerda, Klaus, Wolfgang.
English (Cumberland), Dutch, German, and Swedish: from the personal name Sander, a shortened form of Alexander . Compare Saunders .
German: topographic name for someone who lived on sandy soil, from Sand 1 + -er, suffix denoting an inhabitant.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Saunders was born in 1410, in Charlwood, Surrey, England, his father, Thomas Saundre, was 26 and his mother, Joan Odworth, was 22. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Joan Carew. He died in August 1481, in his hometown, at the age of 71, and was buried in Charlwood, Surrey, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Saunders est né en 1410, à Charlwood, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Saundre, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Joan Odworth, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Joan Carew. Il est décédé en août 1481, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Charlwood, Surrey, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Saunders 1410 in Charlwood, Surrey, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Saundre 26 und seine Mutter Joan Odworth 22. Er hatte mit Joan Carew mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb im August 1481 im Alter von 71 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Charlwood, Surrey, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Saunders è nato il nel 1410 nel Charlwood, Surrey, England, il suo padre, Thomas Saundre, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Joan Odworth, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Joan Carew. Morì nel agosto 1481, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Charlwood, Surrey, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Saundersが1410年にイギリススリーチャールウッドで生まれた時，父Thomas Saundreは26歳，母Joan Odworthは22歳であった。彼はJoan Carewとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1481年8月に故郷で71歳で死去し，イギリススリーチャールウッドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Saunders(이)가 1410년 영국 수리 찰우드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Saundre(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Odworth(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Joan Carew(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1481년 8월 그의 고향에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수리 찰우드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Saunders nasceu em 1410, em Charlwood, Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Saundre, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Joan Odworth, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Joan Carew. Ele faleceu em agosto de 1481, em sua cidade natal, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Charlwood, Surrey, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Saunders родился в 1410 г. в местности чарлвуд, сурри, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Saundre было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Odworth, 22. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Joan Carew. Он умер август 1481 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности чарлвуд, сурри, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Saunders nació en 1410, en Charlwood, Surrey, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Saundre, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Joan Odworth, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Joan Carew. Murió en agosto de 1481, en su pueblo, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Charlwood, Surrey, Inglaterra.
